title: Juke Box Jenny
writer: Robert Lees, Frederic I. Rinaldo, Arthur V. Jones
actors: Ken Murray, Harriet Nelson, Iris Adrian
plot: Roger Wadsworth is a salesman for a company that supplies juke-boxes with classical music recordings, as Mrs. Horton, chief stockholder of the company hates swing music. Because of that, and the fact that Mrs. Horton is the mother...
